name: Andre Labouche
bio:
Physical Appearance: Breton male wearing a red velvet garment with a black and burgundy outfit, fur boots, and a helmet. His body is found at the base of a cliff, carrying a pickaxe and exactly 53 gold.

Race:
Breton

Personality Keywords:
Unprepared, determined

Role:
Deceased spellsword found near Aerin’s Camp by Dive Rock.

Home Location Information:
He is found dead north of Aerin’s Camp, at the base of a cliff near Dive Rock, hidden beside large rocks.

Daily Routine:
No routine is observed. He is encountered deceased.

Abilities:
In life, he was a spellsword capable of using a leveled set of spells from all schools except Mysticism, along with an additional Illusion spell.

Personality – Ill-Fated Climber:
Andre Labouche attempted a mountain journey for which he was poorly equipped, as indicated by his unsuitable clothing and tools. A note found on his body from his daughter Fiona urges him not to undertake the journey, showing that his decision was made despite warnings. His death is the result of a fall from the cliff near Aerin’s Camp.
author: Bethesda
